title: daphne floribunda
intro: Daphne floribunda, also known as the Daphne shrub, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Daphne genus. It is a deciduous shrub native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, such as daphnetin and daphnoretin, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including anti-cancer, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. Daphne floribunda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
